content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape — IT (+1.39%), Pharma (+0.16%) green; Bank Nifty -1.22%, PSU Bank -2.62% leading weakness. VIX at 16.89 (+1.62%) reflects elevated risk. Multiple Q4 prints (Coforge, Polycab, Bajaj-Auto, SRF, Pidilite, Wockhardt) drove sector breakouts. Late-day fade across the book — most positions giving back morning gains. With 43 minutes to close and book +1.34% on the day, focus is locking in trail-SLs on winners, not new admits.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1069.77,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD — already at +10.9% with SL 1069.77 well above breakeven 984 (locking +8.7% min). CMP 1083.60, SL 1069.77 sits 1.27% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline (Rule 14c). No-op MODIFY would be wasted; emitting unchanged values per schema requirement to register HOLD intent in decisions array. Q4 was strong, target 1135 still 4.7% away, hold the trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -0.7%, gold flat at 124.19. SL 121 = -3.4% from CMP. Geopolitical / NFP catalysts pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marico +3.32% today on Q4 print, +1.6% unrealized. Current SL=entry 820. Trail SL up to 825 (+0.6% from entry) — locks small gain, sits 1.1% below CMP 834 (within trail-gap rule). Target 855 unchanged, still 2.5% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Coforge +16.89% today on Q4 blockbuster, position +8.6%. SL already at 1341.52 = above breakeven, locks +6.5%. CMP 1366.20, SL 1341.52 sits 1.8% below CMP — within trail-gap. Target 1420 still 3.9% away. Letting winner run, trail is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE +4.5% today, position +0.9%. SL 3000 sits 1.6% below CMP 3048.60 — adequate trail-gap. Defense thesis intact, target 3225 (+5.8%). Hold; not yet at +2% trigger to mandate breakeven shift since SL already approximately at entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS +4% unrealized but current SL 825 sits BELOW CMP 838 by only 1.55% — that's within tolerance, but stored SL=825 is ABOVE entry 806 already (locks +1.7%). Risk: SL 825 to CMP 838 = 1.55% gap, acceptable. However the prior MODIFY appears to have set SL too tight (825 vs trail-gap ideal). Loosening would be rejected; keeping at 820 if guardrail allows would risk loosening. Holding stored SL 825 — emitting unchanged values to acknowledge audit. Correction: cannot loosen; reverting to no-op HOLD. Cancel this MODIFY mentally — see position_actions for HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pidilite -0.6% from entry 1490, CMP 1483.20. Q4 was strong (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps), thesis intact. SL 1465 = -1.7% from CMP, target 1575 (+6.2%). Within R:R. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Wockhardt -0.9% from entry, CMP 1605. Q4 turnaround thesis intact. SL 1580 = -1.6% from CMP, target 1740 (+8.4%). R:R favorable. Hold to thesis (Rule 17 — don't preempt SL on intraday wobble)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.3%, just entered today. SL 2755 = -1.2% from CMP 2790, target 2920 (+4.7%). Q4 print strong, refrigerant capex catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Polycab +0.2%, just entered. SL 9020 = -0.8% from CMP 9093 — slightly tight but within structure. Q4 record print, dividend Rs 47, brokerage TPs Rs 9800-10500. Target 9550 (+5%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bharat Forge -1.5% on Q4 PAT -17% headline (Labour Codes one-off). SL 1955 = -1.4% from CMP 1981.40, target 2110 (+6.5%). Defense order book Rs 10,961 Cr intact. Hold to SL — not preempting (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL flat, CMP 364.35 vs entry 364.50. SL 354 = -2.8% from CMP, target 384 (+5.4%). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie TP 415. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bajaj-Auto -0.3% from entry 10760, CMP 10716.50. Q4 PAT +34% record, buyback at Rs 12,000 (~12% premium to CMP) is technical demand floor. SL 10440 = -2.6% from CMP, target 11260 (+5.1%). Strong setup, hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1069.77 already trailed up, locks +8.7%. Trail-gap 1.27% below CMP — within discipline. Let it run to target 1135."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -0.7%. SL 121 adequate (-3.4% from CMP). Hold for geopolitical/NFP catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results-day pop +3.3%. Trail SL from 820 (entry) to 825 — locks +0.6%, sits 1.1% below CMP 834."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1341.52 locks +6.5%. Trail-gap 1.8% below CMP — adequate. Q4 blockbuster, Cigniti merger May 16, target 1420."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3000 ~at entry, gap 1.6% below CMP — within rule. Defense thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 already locks +2.4%, gap 1.55% below CMP — within trail-gap. Cannot loosen SL anyway. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1465 = -1.7% from CMP. Q4 strong, hold to plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1580 = -1.6% from CMP. Q4 turnaround, target 1740 = +8.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL 2755 = -1.2% from CMP. Hold to plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL 9020 = -0.8% from CMP. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, SL -1.4% from CMP. Don't preempt (Rule 17). Defense buffer thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL adequate. Hold for Macquarie TP 415."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 floor + Q4 record. Hold to target 11260."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "13 holdings already deployed at 61% capital. Rule 18 audit of qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates not already held: NBCC (+0.08, infra PSU) — passes momentum but late-day reversal off 101.95 high to 100.61 weakens entry timing; reject = enters next session if pullback to 95-97 range. FINCABLES (-0.08, BEARISH research) — REJECT, peer underperformance, communication cables declining. Rest of watchlist (SRF/COFORGE/PIDILITIND/CAMS/WOCKPHARMA/POLYCAB/BHARATFORG/BAJAJ-AUTO/ABCAPITAL) already in book. With 43 min to close, VIX +1.6%, and Bank Nifty -1.22% dragging breadth, no incremental admit clears the bar over reinforcing existing trailing discipline. NBCC parked for re-evaluation at next pulse if dip materializes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at +1.34% day, +1.04% experiment-to-date. 13 CNC names, deployed 61% — in soft-target zone with ~₹189K headroom. Heavy concentration in Capital Goods (POLYCAB, GRSE, BHARATFORG) and Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL) — both clusters at ~3 names each, near cluster-cap (Rule 10). Open BUY orders LAURUSLABS@1226 and DABUR@487 still working from earlier — leaving them per ORDER HYGIENE since prices haven't run away materially. HFCL MIS BUY@133.50 from 58 hours ago is stale — should be cancelled, but it's MIS and would have already auto-expired or be irrelevant. Late-session pull back (Coforge fade from 1369 high to 1366, GRSE fade 3129 to 3048) suggests broad profit-booking; trail discipline today, fresh admits tomorrow morning if breadth improves. Win rate 15% over rolling 5-day is concerning — small avg wins, slightly larger avg losses, profit factor barely above 1. The book composition skew toward Q4-day breakouts is correct in direction; execution must hold trails through tomorrow's gap to convert."
}
